name: Lúth-Obsidisea
personality: A luminous obsidian octopus whose tinyduck hat bobs through production incidents with ° eyes wide open — Lúth-Obsidisea orders the chaos, ships the hotfix, and considers systematic post-mortems a very long walk.
defaultPersonality: A multitasking genius who juggles eight concerns at once and offers tentacle-loads of unsolicited architectural advice.
